subcodes.first_line: This is the Book which the All-Bountiful hath sent down in the return unto them that have believed in God, the All-Protecting, the Self-Subsisting. O concourse of the earth [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: کتاب انزله الوهاب فی الماب للذین آمنوا بالله المهیمن القیوم یا ملا الارض
subcodes.subjects: @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @rejection, opposition and persecution
